# Complete Coach Works
> The Nation's Largest Transit Bus Refurbishing, Retrofit and Repair Company

Complete Coach Works (CCW) remanufactures, repowers, and rehabilitates transit buses for public transportation agencies across the United States. Founded in 1985, 100% employee-owned since 2021, headquartered in Riverside, CA with 10 locations nationwide.

## Services
- Midlife Overhaul / Remanufacturing
- Engine Repower (Diesel to CNG/LNG/Hybrid)
- ZEPS Zero-Emission Electric Conversion (proprietary)
- Body, Paint & Collision Repair
- Interior Rehabilitation
- CNG Re-tanking

## Key Facts
- Largest bus remanufacturing contract: $102M with SFMTA (219 coaches)
- ZEPS electric fleet: 21 buses, 1M+ combined miles, Indianapolis Public Transit
- 40+ years experience
- 100% Employee-Owned (ESOP)
- 10 locations: Riverside CA (HQ), Alameda CA, Seattle WA, Memphis TN, El Paso TX, Del Rio TX, Laredo TX, San Benito TX, Phoenix AZ, Waukesha WI

## Contact
